action_description: Generate a structured daily brief delivered at 6:30 AM: top 3 decisions needed, top 3 revenue risks, top 3 open commitments, and calendar summary for the day.
business_goal: CEO starts each day with a clear operating picture instead of inbox archaeology.
trigger_definition: Daily at 06:30 local time. Aggregate from memory store, calendar, and open action items.
success_metric: Brief delivered by 06:35 every business day
failure_metric: Brief not delivered or missing any of the 3 required sections

action_description: Detect deals with no activity in 7+ days. Draft a follow-up email to the relevant contact and surface it for CEO review.
business_goal: Prevent deal leakage from inaction. Every stale deal is money sitting on the table.
trigger_definition: Daily at 07:00. Query CRM for deals where last_activity < now-7d and stage not in [closed_won, closed_lost].
success_metric: Follow-up sent within 24h of detection
failure_metric: Deal goes 14+ days with no activity

action_description: Every Monday generate a structured pipeline review pack: all active deals by stage, changes since last week, at-risk deals, required next steps, and deal velocity metrics.
business_goal: CEO sees the full revenue picture in 5 minutes, not 45.
trigger_definition: Monday at 07:00.
success_metric: Pack delivered by Monday 07:15
failure_metric: Pack delayed past 09:00

action_description: Detect invoices past due by 7, 14, or 30 days. Draft escalating follow-up emails keyed to the overdue tier. Present for approval before send.
business_goal: Collect what is owed. Every overdue invoice is a zero-interest loan to the customer.
trigger_definition: Daily at 08:00. Query accounting system for invoices where due_date < today and status != paid.
success_metric: Follow-up sent within 24h of detection
failure_metric: Invoice reaches 45 days with no contact

action_description: After a proposal is sent, trigger follow-up prompts at 3, 7, and 14 days if no response. Draft email at each interval. Escalate to CEO at 14 days.
business_goal: Proposals that go dark die. Systematic follow-up keeps momentum.
trigger_definition: Trigger on proposal_sent event. Then schedule follow-ups at T+3d, T+7d, T+14d if response_received=false.
success_metric: Response obtained or deal closed within 21 days of proposal
failure_metric: Proposal goes dark >21 days with no logged contact

action_description: 60 minutes before any external meeting, auto-generate a dossier: who is attending, their company, last interaction, open deals, relevant context from memory, and 3 suggested talking points.
business_goal: CEO enters every meeting prepared. No prep time wasted. No missed context.
trigger_definition: Trigger T-60min before any calendar event with ≥1 external attendee.
success_metric: Dossier delivered ≥45 min before meeting
failure_metric: Dossier delivered <15 min before meeting or not at all

action_description: Detect weeks where CEO has <4 hours of uninterrupted focus blocks. Recommend calendar edits to create or protect focus time. Flag when external requests erode them.
business_goal: Deep work requires time. Calendar without protection fills with noise.
trigger_definition: Weekly on Friday: analyze next week's calendar for focus time availability.
success_metric: CEO has ≥4h of focus blocks per week
failure_metric: CEO has zero focus blocks in a week

action_description: For all active projects with pending permits or interconnection applications, generate a weekly follow-up status check and draft inquiry emails to the relevant agencies.
business_goal: Permitting delays are project killers. Systematic follow-up keeps the queue moving.
trigger_definition: Every Friday at 09:00 for projects where permit_status = pending and last_contact > 7 days.
success_metric: No permit goes >10 days without a touchpoint
failure_metric: Permit stalls >3 weeks without follow-up

action_description: Score and route inbound leads by estimated deal size, fit, and urgency. Surface top 3 daily. Route below-threshold leads away from CEO.
business_goal: CEO time on highest-value prospects only. Noise routed out automatically.
trigger_definition: On new lead entry in CRM. Score and route within 1 hour.
success_metric: Top lead surfaced to CEO within 2h of entry
failure_metric: High-value lead not surfaced within 24h

action_description: Scan CEO inbox twice daily. Categorize by: needs_reply, FYI_only, action_required, delegate_out, ignore. Surface only needs_reply and action_required items.
business_goal: CEO processes only what requires CEO-level attention. Everything else is routed or dismissed.
trigger_definition: 08:00 and 13:00 daily.
success_metric: Triage summary delivered within 5 min of trigger
failure_metric: Critical email missed or misfiled

action_description: Detect when project milestones are behind schedule by comparing planned vs actual dates. Flag to project owner and CEO when slippage exceeds 5 days.
business_goal: Slippage compounds. Early detection gives time to correct before cascade failure.
trigger_definition: Daily: compare planned_date vs today for all incomplete milestones. Escalate when lag > 5 days.
success_metric: All slippage flagged within 1 business day of crossing threshold
failure_metric: Milestone slips >2 weeks without escalation

action_description: After a meeting ends, extract all action items, decisions, and commitments. Assign owners where determinable. Present structured list for CEO approval before any notifications are sent.
business_goal: Nothing falls through after a meeting. Every commitment is tracked.
trigger_definition: Trigger T+5min after calendar event end. If notes or transcript are available, process immediately.
success_metric: Action items captured and reviewed within 2h of meeting end
failure_metric: Action items not captured within 24h

action_description: Scan upcoming calendar events and flag meetings that lack agenda, have no decision to be made, or could be replaced by async communication. Recommend decline, delegate, or compress.
business_goal: Protect CEO's most finite resource: focused time.
trigger_definition: Weekly on Sunday at 18:00. Scan all meetings in next 7 days.
success_metric: CEO reviews flags and acts on ≥50% of them
failure_metric: Zero flags acted upon in 2+ consecutive weeks

action_description: Extract and structure tasks from raw notes, voice transcripts, emails, and chat messages. Create structured task records with owner, due date, and priority.
business_goal: Work mentioned in passing must not be lost. Capture everything; structure what matters.
trigger_definition: On any new unstructured input (note, email, transcript) delivered to OpenClaw.
success_metric: 100% of actionable inputs captured as structured tasks
failure_metric: Actionable item from input goes untracked

action_description: Every Friday, compile a list of all commitments the CEO has made (extracted from emails, meeting notes, and memory) that have not yet been confirmed as completed.
business_goal: CEO's word is currency. Untracked commitments erode trust and relationships.
trigger_definition: Friday at 15:00.
success_metric: Zero commitments unreviewed by end of week
failure_metric: Commitment older than 14 days with no action

action_description: Monitor message and action logs. Identify recurring request patterns that are performed manually more than 3 times per month. Surface as automation candidates.
business_goal: Systematically surface work that should be automated but is not yet.
trigger_definition: Weekly on Sunday. Analyze last 7 days of logs for repeated patterns.
success_metric: At least 1 automation candidate surfaced per month
failure_metric: Zero new automation candidates identified in 60 days

action_description: For active diligence or closing processes, track all outstanding document requests. Send automated reminders to counterparties at 3-day intervals until received.
business_goal: Missing documents stall deals. Systematic reminders close the gap without CEO involvement.
trigger_definition: Every 3 days per outstanding document request. Stop when received or deal closed.
success_metric: Document collected within 9 days of initial request
failure_metric: Document outstanding >14 days with no escalation

action_description: Aggregate all items waiting on CEO approval across email, project tracker, and document systems. Deliver a batched approval queue twice weekly to prevent decision fragmentation.
business_goal: Batch approvals into structured windows. Eliminates reactive interruption from individual approval requests.
trigger_definition: Tuesday and Thursday at 08:30.
success_metric: Approval queue cleared within 2 business days
failure_metric: Item waiting on approval >5 business days without CEO awareness

action_description: Alert on contracts expiring in 90, 60, and 30 days. Generate renewal checklist. Assign owner. Escalate to CEO at 30-day mark.
business_goal: No contract lapses silently. Every expiry is a renegotiation or risk event.
trigger_definition: Daily check: flag contracts where expiry_date in [today+90, today+60, today+30].
success_metric: Renewal initiated ≥30 days before expiry
failure_metric: Contract lapses without renewal discussion

action_description: Maintain a watchlist of top 20 strategic partners. Flag any partner with no CEO contact in 30+ days. Draft a brief reconnect note.
business_goal: Strategic relationships require maintenance. Passive neglect destroys opportunity.
trigger_definition: Weekly: flag partners where last_ceo_contact > 30 days.
success_metric: No strategic partner goes >45 days without contact
failure_metric: Relationship cools due to missed contact

action_description: Monitor project budgets. Alert when actual spend exceeds budget by >10%. Generate variance summary with contributing line items.
business_goal: Budget overruns discovered early are manageable. Discovered late are profit killers.
trigger_definition: Daily: compare actual_spend vs budget per project. Alert at 10% and 20% overrun.
success_metric: CEO notified within 1 business day of crossing threshold
failure_metric: Budget overrun discovered after month-end close

action_description: Weekly: identify CRM records missing key fields (owner, close date, value, last activity). Generate a clean-up task list for review.
business_goal: A dirty CRM produces misleading pipeline reports. Garbage in, garbage out.
trigger_definition: Every Monday at 06:00.
success_metric: CRM field completeness >90%
failure_metric: >20% of active deals missing owner or close date

action_description: Track all vendor deliverable deadlines. Alert 5 days before due. Generate escalation if vendor misses deadline.
business_goal: Vendor slippage delays projects. Early detection = early correction.
trigger_definition: Daily: flag vendor milestones where due_date within 5 days or past due.
success_metric: All vendor deadlines flagged ≥5 days in advance
failure_metric: Vendor misses deadline without prior alert

action_description: Auto-generate weekly project status summaries for each active project. Distribute to relevant stakeholders without requiring manual effort.
business_goal: Status reporting should not consume project team time. It should happen automatically.
trigger_definition: Friday at 14:00 for all active projects.
success_metric: Reports generated and sent by Friday 17:00
failure_metric: Status report delayed >2 business days

action_description: 24h before any internal meeting with no agenda, auto-draft an agenda based on meeting title, attendees, and relevant open items from memory.
business_goal: Agendaless meetings waste everyone's time. Auto-drafting removes the prep burden.
trigger_definition: T-24h before any calendar event where agenda is null and attendee_count >= 2.
success_metric: Agenda available ≥1h before meeting
failure_metric: Meeting starts with no agenda
